blocks.content: I beat him. Not by a lot. But clearly.
I beat him by half a step. Clean. I didn't look over once.
I finished second. Closer than the start felt, but still second.
I finished second. The hesitation cost me the race before it started.

blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: Good instincts. You ran your race.

blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: You've got speed. You got in your own way.

blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: You've got speed. You just let the moment get big on you.
That was it. Come back tomorrow. I found out later that half the kids who tried out didn't get that.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: BRUHHHH. I TOLD YOU. I TOLD YOU FR FR.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: From Coach Briggs that is literally everything. You're on the team homie. You just don't have the jersey yet.
